title: OFSI General licence INT/2025/7328184
body: " OFSI General licence INT/2025/7328184 OFSI General licence INT/2025/7328184 Publication notice   On 26 September 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/7328184 under all UK Autonomous Sanctions Regulations (see Annex 1 of the General Licence for the list of relevant Regulations) which allows a Revenue Authority to make Permitted Payments to UK DPs’ Frozen UK Bank Accounts. A Revenue Authority may also set-off, to the extent permitted or required under any enactment, the amount of any Permitted Payment (as a credit) against any liability of the same UK DP to pay an amount to that Revenue Authority (as a debit). "
